about.title: About Us
about.headline: Crafting Culinary Excellence Since 2012
about.p1: Premium catering services crafted with passion. From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations, we deliver culinary excellence that delights every guest.
about.p2: Our team of 40+ expert chefs and event professionals bring years of experience and genuine passion to every event. We source the finest local and imported ingredients, ensuring every bite tells a story of quality and care.

wedding.title: Wedding Banquets
wedding.desc: Elegant multi-course meals tailored to your love story. From intimate 20-person dinners to grand 500-person receptions.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.desc: Professional service for conferences, product launches, and team celebrations. We handle every detail.

private.title: Private Parties
private.desc: Birthday gatherings, anniversaries, and family events made extraordinary with personalised menus.

outdoor.title: Outdoor Catering
outdoor.desc: Full setup for outdoor events with premium equipment, live cooking stations, and décor.

dessert.title: Dessert Tables
dessert.desc: Stunning sweet spreads featuring handcrafted pastries, cakes, and confections.

live.title: Live Stations
live.desc: Interactive cooking stations — sushi, pasta, grill — that entertain and delight guests.

101.name: Bruschetta Trio
101.desc: Tomato, olive tapenade & whipped ricotta on artisan bread.

102.name: Smoked Salmon Canapés
102.desc: Norwegian salmon with dill crème fraîche on blinis.

104.name: Charcuterie Board
104.desc: Cured meats, artisan cheeses, nuts & seasonal fruits.

201.name: Rack of Lamb
201.desc: Rosemary & garlic crust with red wine jus & roasted vegetables.

202.name: Roasted Chicken Supreme
202.desc: Free-range chicken with truffle butter & potato gratin.

203.name: Beef Tenderloin
203.desc: Prime tenderloin with béarnaise sauce & asparagus tips.

204.name: Vegetarian Wellington
204.desc: Mushroom duxelles & spinach in golden puff pastry.

205.name: Grilled Sea Bass
205.desc: Mediterranean herb marinade with caponata & lemon butter.

301.name: Dark Chocolate Fondant
301.desc: Warm molten centre with vanilla bean ice cream.

302.name: Crème Brûlée
302.desc: Classic French custard with caramelised sugar crust.

303.name: Mango Panna Cotta
303.desc: Silky Italian cream set with fresh mango coulis.

304.name: Macaron Tower
304.desc: Signature display tower — 60 assorted French macarons.

401.name: Signature Mocktail Pack
401.desc: Set of 4 house mocktails — berry, citrus, cucumber & rose.

402.name: Premium Tea Station
402.desc: Selection of 8 fine loose-leaf teas with accompaniments.

403.name: Fresh Juice Bar
403.desc: Cold-pressed seasonal juices served per guest.

texts.1: Gold Catering turned our wedding into a dream. Every dish was flawless and the staff were impeccable.
texts.2: Our product launch dinner was a resounding success. The team handled 200 guests with effortless professionalism.
texts.3: I recommend Gold Catering to every client. Consistent quality, beautiful presentation, and always on time.

qr.title: QR Code
qr.label: Scan to Contact Us
qr.heading: Instant Contact
qr.desc: Scan this QR code with your phone camera to open a WhatsApp chat with us instantly. Share it at events or print it on menus and invitations.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Ready to create an unforgettable experience? Fill in the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
